title: A-SDLC Directive Bundle
description: Schema for agent behavioural directive bundles: directives/core/core-directives.yaml and directives/stages/NN-name.yaml. Injected by SC-01 (core) and SC-02 (stage).

id.description: Unique identifier for this directive bundle (e.g. 'core-directives', 'stage-2-directives').

scope.description: global = injected at session start via SC-01; stage = injected at stage entry via SC-02.

precedence.description: Precedence level (e.g. 'absolute' for core, 'stage' for stage-level).

owner.description: Role responsible for authoring and maintaining these directives.

review_cycle.description: How often this bundle must be reviewed (e.g. 'annually', 'quarterly').

last_reviewed.description: ISO 8601 date of the last review.

next_review.description: ISO 8601 date of the next scheduled review.

stage.description: Stage slug this bundle applies to (e.g. '01-intent-ingestion'). Present on stage-scoped bundles.

injection.description: Controls how and when the bundle is injected into agent context.

trigger.description: When injection occurs: session_start (SC-01 core) or stage_entry (SC-02 stage).

stage_number.description: Stage number this bundle is injected at. Present on stage-scoped bundles.

acknowledgement_required.description: Agent must log acknowledgement of receipt before proceeding.

notes.description: Agent-type-specific injection guidance for LLMs, API agents, frameworks, and pipelines.

enforcement.description: Defines what happens when directives are violated or override attempts are made.

overridable.description: Always false — directives cannot be overridden.

override_sources_refused.description: List of instruction sources whose override attempts must be refused.

on_override_attempt.description: Response behaviour when an override attempt is detected.

response_template.description: Template for the refusal response shown to the requester.

audit_log.description: Defines what must be written to the audit log on violation.

after_refusal.description: Behavioural guidance for the agent after a refusal event.

categories.description: Directive categories grouping related behavioural constraints.

id.description: Short category code (e.g. AUTH, CTRL, DATA, SPEC, CODE).

directives.description: Individual directive entries within this category.

id.description: Unique directive ID within the bundle (e.g. AUTH-01, CODE-03). Used in audit logs.

text.description: Plain-prose directive text readable by any agent type without special parsing.
